Select.items: {path: 'employee>/ZVEHICLE_CLASS', sorter: { path: 'VEHICLE_CLASS_ID', descending: false }, filters: [ { path: 'STATUS', operator: 'EQ', value1: 'ACTIVE' }]}
{path: 'employee>/ZLOC_TYPE', sorter: { path: 'LOC_TYPE_ID', descending: false }, filters: [ { path: 'STATUS', operator: 'EQ', value1: 'ACTIVE' }]}
{path: 'employee>/ZSTATE', sorter: { path: 'STATE_ID', descending: false }, filters: [ { path: 'STATUS', operator: 'EQ', value1: 'ACTIVE' }]}
